2603.23495.title: VISion On Request: Enhanced VLLM efficiency with sparse, dynamically selected, vision-language interactions
2603.23495.paper_summary: Existing approaches for improving the efficiency of Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) are largely based on the concept of visual token reduction. This approach, however, creates an information bottleneck that impairs performance, especially on challenging tasks that require fine-grained understanding and reasoning. In this work, we challenge this paradigm by introducing VISion On Request (VISOR), a method that reduces inference cost without discarding visual information. Instead of compressing the image, VISOR improves efficiency by sparsifying the interaction between image and text tokens. Specifically, the language model attends to the full set of high-resolution visual tokens through a small, strategically placed set of attention layers: general visual context is provided by efficient cross-attention between text-image, while a few well-placed and dynamically selected self-attention layers refine the visual representations themselves, enabling complex, high-resolution reasoning when needed. Based on this principle, we first train a single universal network on a range of computational budgets by varying the number of self-attention layers, and then introduce a lightweight policy mechanism that dynamically allocates visual computation based on per-sample complexity. Extensive experiments show that VISOR drastically reduces computational cost while matching or exceeding state-of-the-art results across a diverse suite of benchmarks, and excels in challenging tasks that require detailed visual understanding.
2603.23495.paper_summary_zh: 現有的提高大型視覺-語言模型（LVLMs）效率的方法主要基於視覺標記減少的概念。然而，這種方法會產生信息瓶頸，影響性能，特別是在需要細緻理解和推理的挑戰性任務中。在這項工作中，我們挑戰這一範式，提出了需求視覺（VISion On Request，簡稱VISOR）的方法，該方法在不丟棄視覺信息的情況下降低推理成本。VISOR並不是通過壓縮圖像來提高效率，而是通過稀疏化圖像和文本標記之間的交互來實現。具體而言，語言模型通過一小組策略性放置的注意力層關注完整的高解析度視覺標記：通過文本-圖像之間的高效交叉注意力提供一般視覺上下文，而幾個精心放置且動態選擇的自注意力層則精煉視覺表示，當需要時使得複雜的高解析度推理成為可能。基於這一原則，我們首先在不同的計算預算範圍內訓練一個單一的通用網絡，通過改變自注意力層的數量，然後引入一種輕量級的策略機制，根據每個樣本的複雜性動態分配視覺計算。大量實驗表明，VISOR大幅降低了計算成本，同時在各種基準測試中匹配或超越了最先進的結果，並在需要詳細視覺理解的挑戰性任務中表現出色。
2603.23495.author: Adrian Bulat et.al.
2603.23495.authors: Adrian Bulat, Alberto Baldrati, Ioannis Maniadis Metaxas, Yassine Ouali, Georgios Tzimiropoulos
